overall.description: Third-person game footage of an armed character running through a shadowed rocky canyon toward a natural stone archway. The environment features desert rock formations with sparse vegetation and transitions from dim interior lighting to brighter exterior light through the archway exit.

scene_state.functional_zone: shadowed canyon passage with high rock walls

agents.ego_description: running steadily through the canyon holding a weapon, approaching the distant stone archway

entered.detail: tall textured rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon passage
tall textured rock wall forming the right boundary of the canyon passage
large natural rock archway forming the exit of the canyon with light visible through the opening
sandy dirt ground with scattered small rocks and sparse vegetation
small sparse desert shrubs scattered along the canyon floor

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a narrow shadowed canyon with high rock walls on both sides. The natural stone archway is visible in the distance as the primary focal point, with dim blue-purple lighting dominating the enclosed space.

events.description: ambient lighting brightens as character approaches the archway exit, revealing warm campfire light ahead
character passes through the stone archway into the open area beyond

agents.ego_description: continuing to run toward and through the archway, weapon still drawn

entered.detail: warm orange glow visible through the archway suggesting a fire or light source ahead
tall rock spires and formations visible in the open area beyond the archway

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the stone archway exit, with lighting gradually brightening to reveal a campfire glow and distant rock formations ahead. The canyon walls close in as the character passes through the archway transition point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a shadowed rocky canyon that gradually opens into a brighter exterior landscape. It begins with the character running through a narrow passage enclosed by high rock walls, where dim blue-purple lighting dominates the space. As the character advances toward a distant natural stone archway, the lighting steadily brightens to reveal a warm campfire glow and far-off rock formations. The scene then tightens as the camera passes through the archway transition point, finally emerging from the enclosure into the open light of the desert environment.
